PenaltyID.description: The unique ID of this penalty

PeriodID.description: The unique ID of the period during which this penalty occurred

Sequence.description: The sequence/order that this penalty happened

TimeRemainingMinutes.description: Number of minutes that have passed in the current period.  NOTE: this field name might be misleading as it actually represents the game clock minutes which are the number of minutes that have already passed in the period.

TimeRemainingSeconds.description: Number of seconds that have passed in the current period.  NOTE: this field name might be misleading as it actually represents the game clock seconds which are the number of minutes that have already passed in the period.

PenalizedTeamID.description: The TeamID of the team who committed the penalty

PenalizedPlayerID.description: The PlayerID of the player who committed the penalty

DrawnByTeamID.description: The TeamID of the player/team that drew the penalty

DrawnByPlayerID.description: The PlayerID of the player who drew the penalty

IsBenchPenalty.description: Whether or not the penalty is a bench penalty

BenchPenaltyServedByPlayerID.description: The PlayerID of the player who served the bench penalty
